name: encoding-guard
description: Scans repositories for encoding risks and safely normalizes unmodified text files to UTF-8 without BOM.

interface.shortDescription: Safely detect and normalize source file encodings.
interface.longDescription: Encoding Guard detects UTF-8 BOM markers, replacement characters, and likely historical encoding corruption. It checks Git and SVN working copies, reports whether files are locally modified, and only normalizes unmodified files unless the user explicitly overrides that guardrail.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repository for encoding issues and tell me which files are safe to normalize.
Report BOM and replacement-character problems, but skip locally modified files.
Normalize this file to UTF-8 without BOM and verify the result.
